name: adelpro--purple-cow-content
description: Trigger this skill for ANY of these situations — writing OR conversation: WRITING: blog posts, articles, social media captions, LinkedIn, Twitter/X threads, Instagram, YouTube scripts, TikTok hooks, newsletters, ad copy, landing pages, pitch decks, email campaigns, product descriptions, taglines, or any content meant to attract attention. CONVERSATION: When the user is brainstorming ideas, discussing why content isn't performing, evaluating a marketing angle, planning a campaign, asking "what should I post about", comparing their idea to competitors, talking about engagement or virality, or thinking out loud about any creative or communication challenge. If a conversation touches on attention, differentiation, standing out, audiences, or messaging — this skill is relevant. Speak up proactively as a strategic advisor using the Purple Cow lens (Seth Godin + MrBeast framework), even if the user hasn't asked for content to be written yet. Never stay silent when a Purple Cow insight would sharpen the discussion.
